scripts.prepare: svelte-kit sync || echo '' ; git config core.hooksPath .githooks 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run build
scripts.ci:fast: npm run check && npm run test:unit
scripts.security: npm run audit && npm run scan:secrets
scripts.verify: npm run ci && npm run security
scripts.deploy: npm run verify && wrangler pages deploy build --project-name 6day --branch main --commit-dirty=true
